content: Autonomous curiosity-driven AI agents can be designed to actively prune and curate their own working memory to prioritize unlearned, high-information content, aligning intrinsic curiosity signals with cutting-edge 2024-2025 active learning memory architectures. This creates a self-improving loop where the agent's innate desire to explore unknowns directly shapes what it retains long-term, rather than relying on human-specified memory retention rules.
